This standard governs core tenant configuration spanning Defender, Intune/MDM, Entra ID, Exchange Online, SharePoint Online, Microsoft Teams, and global Microsoft 365 settings, using curated CIPP templates aligned to best‑practice defaults. The drift standard continuously evaluates the environment for deviation from the defined baseline and provides visibility and controlled remediation where appropriate.

For Bundle plan clients, this drift standard acts as the unifying control layer across managed security, tenant governance, and endpoint/platform management—ensuring the environment remains aligned to Bezalu’s defined baseline over time without introducing per‑control or per‑service fragmentation.
